name: Ginger Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into thin strips about 1/4-inch by 3/4-inch by 1/2-inch. Set aside.
2. In a blender, blend ginger, garlic, water, peanut butter, soy sauce, 1 tablespoon curry powder, and cayenne. Pour the mixture over the prepared tofu pieces. Gently turn and press tofu until all the liquid is absorbed.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil and saute onion until translucent. Add remaining curry powder. Stir fry for 1 minute, then add tofu and continue to fry until tofu starts to brown. Pour in soy milk, salt, and pepper. Bring to a simmer and add peas. Cook for another 3 minutes.
4. Just before serving, stir in the almonds.
